title: Pituranthos nudus
intro: Pituranthos nudus, also known as Naked Pituranthos or Desert Broccoli, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pituranthos nudus is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in soothing digestive issues and promoting wound healing. The plant's bioactive constituents include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Pituranthos nudus is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
taxonomy: Pituranthos nudus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as the Naked-leaved Heliotrope.
